title: Décor Snap n Seal 500ml Stainless Steel Water Bottle with Straw, BPA Free - Leakproof Metal Flask with Carry Handle for School, Travel, Work & Gym - Ideal Drinking Bottle for Kids & Adults - Grey

Soft Touch Finish - High quality water bottle with a sleek, soft touch finish in matte grey.
Protect our Planet - Help save the planet and avoid single-use plastics with the Décor Snap n Seal, made from premium food grade 304 stainless steel
Reusable & Durable - Décor have been making lives easier for over 65 years with homewares that are functional, affordable and made to last
